state = {

  'updated_at': '2026-05-17 | 13:14 (UTC+3)',

  'curator': {'role':'curator','provider':'gpt_codex','status':'ACTIVE'},
  'analyst': {'role':'analyst','provider':'gpt_codex','status':'ACTIVE'},
  'providers': {
    'claude': {
      'contour':'primary',
      'status':'UNKNOWN',
      'limit_state':'UNKNOWN',
      'last_outcome': None,
      'failure_signals':['failure','cancelled','timeout','missing_result_after_ttl','transport_failed']

    'gpt': {
      'contour':'reserve',

    (samples/('provider_decision_'+signal+'.json')).write_text(json.dumps(rec, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
